title: LittlePictureFrames
description: Display all kinds of pictures and videos from the internet ingame.
body: This mod allows you to pick any picture or video of the internet and bring it to minecraft. You can choose the size, rotate or flip it. You can do basically everything. No need for uploading files to the server (no need for storage) and no laggy server (no need for sending pictures to all clients). The idea is to copy a link from the internet and paste it into the frame. So all client will download the picture themselves. To add your own pictures, i recommend to use imgur or similar websites. Requires CreativeCore and WaterMedia Crafting recipe for creative frame Datapack You can link files relative to the minecraft directory using "water://local/". Powered by VLCJ VLC 3 is required to play videos (Download). Looking for a server to play with your friends. Our sponsor got you covered: [ ](https://bisecthosting.com/teamcreative) Use the promo code teamcreative to get 25% off the first month on any of the gaming servers!
